message:
lint(widgets): suppress #[must_use] warnings in test code

Follow-up to the #[must_use] annotation sweep. Methods like
handle_event(), remove(), navigate_targets(), and cancel_drag() now
return values that must be used. In test call-sites where the return
value is intentionally ignored, wrap with `let _ =` to satisfy the
lint without changing test semantics.

Affected modules:
- command_palette (mod.rs + property_tests.rs): handle_event() calls
- focus/graph.rs: remove() calls
- focus/manager.rs: graph_mut().remove() call
- keyboard_drag.rs: navigate_targets() and cancel_drag() calls

Also includes beads tracker update (.beads/issues.jsonl).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
